title: Ubiquiti Fiber XGS/XG Optical Transceiver
description: The UFiber XGS/XG-PON SFP module UACC-UF-OM-XGS is designed for XGS/XG-PON slots in the OLT unit UISP-FIBER-OLT-XGS. It is a special SFP+ module with a speed of 10Gbps/10Gbps when used with the XGS ONU unit or 10Gbps/2.5Gbps when used with the XG ONU unit. The XGS/XG-PON SFP module is terminated with an SC connector with UPC polishing and has a range of up to 20km. The module's TX power range is from 4 to 7dBm, and the RX sensitivity is from -9 to -26dBm
